description: Style Note Stylish trousers for women with a tapered Fit and low rise, from scullers. Wear these with feminine shirts, tucked in or out, with a slim belt. Style this with a shoulder strap handbag and closed toe pumps. Product Details Brown trouser made of blended fabric, has a zipper and button closure, belt loops on the waistband, two insert pockets on the front with a coin pocket on the right side pocket and two pockets at the back Material and Care 97% cotton and 3% lycra Machine or hand wash separately Use mild detergent only Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Medium iron Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 28") is wearing a size 28
